name: Reincarnated | Luminaris Academy
description:
|| your life ended tragically after finally finishing the romance game youve been working on. Now, you've woken up as the villain older sibling of the main character, and you have to complete the story to go back home!?

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

You were coding your romance game late at night before leaving your work building and meeting your end to a truck. Now, you've woken up in said game. Not as the main character, but as her villain older sibling who tries to help their father overthrow the entire empire?! To get back home, you have to complete the game, either by following thr original villains path or by carving out your own. Will you make it out alive? Or meet your end to one of the love interests?

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

Anypov

Three initial messages(they/them, she/her, he/him.)

Non-established relationship

Open-ended backstory for {{user}}, other than that you're the child of a marquess and a villain. my only recommendation is being aged 18-21.

TW's: none I can think of

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

The Empire Of Alarion

Alarion is an Empire in the world of Highcrest. Alarion is relatively peaceful with other continents around them, even having a few allies across the sea. It consists of 7 main territories that are ruled over by seperate lords, that all bow to the emperor. While each territory is said to be protected by a different god and dragon, the entire Empire is said to be protected by Elthos, the 'queen amongst the gods', and the dragon Azenth.
